column8: Student exchange programmes provide an incredible opportunity for students of one country to go and study at institutions abroad. At their best, they are culturally satisfying and highly___________ . (EDUCATION)
column9: For short-term exchange programmes, students may spend just a summer in the host country. For longer-term programmes, students____________live in the host country for 10-12 month. (GENERAL)
column10: Students are often expected to have a firm grasp of the language before they go. Students from Germany, for example, must usually have the_____________to communicate in English in order to praticipate in an American exchange programme. (ABLE)
column11: It is typical for students to stay with a host family while they are studying abroad. This provides them with the opportunity of learning at close quarters what_____________life in the host country is really like. (DAY)
column12: Students enter the host country with a special student visa. Applications can take six to ten month to process, and students must return home once time is up. It is usually______________for them to stay longer. (POSSIBLE)
column13: When students return home, they are sometimes required to share what they have learnt with others. This might be achieved by them giving some kind of_________________to their tutors or classmates. (PRESENT)
column14: Stella McCartney is more than just the daughter of music legend Paul McCartney of the Beatles. She is famous in her own right as a fashion________________ . (DESIGN)
column15: Born in London in 1971, McCartney studied at Central Saint Martins College of Arts and Design. Alexander McQueen, another________________icon of the fashion world, studied there as well. (GLOBE)
column16: Despite her well-known last name, not everyone was sure that the would be________________in the fashion industry, but she worked  hard to create eye-catching clothing and won early awards for her sharp, confident style. (SUCCESS)
column17: Of course, she was well-connected to the rich and famous before she made a name for herself in fashion. During her_________________, famous supermodels including Naomi Campbell and Kate Moss wore her clothes for the college's runway show. (GRADUATE)
column18: Her clothes are popular and sell well. Her 2005 collection for H&M clothing shops was designed to offer her fans a more affordable range, and sold out almost________________ . (IMMEDIATE)
column19: Aside from day and evening wear, she has designed clothing foe events, including the uniforms for the British______________to wear in the 2012 London Olympics. She has also designed underwear, a range of skincare products and her own perfume. (COMPETE)
